description:
secretx-core/src/lib.rs accessors flagged by clippy::pedantic must_use_candidate:
   line 56  SecretValue::new
   line 60  SecretValue::as_bytes
   line 64  SecretValue::into_bytes
   line 1188 SecretUri::backend
   line 1193 SecretUri::path

Idiomatic Rust: pure accessors that allocate (e.g. ::new) or return a borrow that the caller must consume should be #[must_use]. A caller that writes 'secret.as_bytes();' on its own line accidentally has done nothing — silently dropping a borrowed reference is rarely intentional.

Fix: add #[must_use] to each. Mechanical change, applies the lint suggestion as-is.
title: Public accessors lack #[must_use] attribute
